note: Checklist API is a developer-facing API: an info hook defines checklists, from which routes and permissions are auto-generated, and progress is saved to config or state. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) since they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want my module to define a new fillable checklist with Checklist API. Which hook do I implement, and what are the required keys of each checklist definition?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_checklistapi_checklist_info(), returning an array keyed by checklist ID. Each definition needs at least #title and #path (a route is only built when both are present), typically with a #callback returning the groups/items.

evals.prompt: How do I structure the checklist items for a Checklist API checklist, and how do groups render? How do I make an item start checked automatically?
evals.expected_output: The #callback returns an array of groups (rendered as vertical tabs), each with #title and item arrays. Each item has a #title, optional #description, #weight, and links (#text/#url). Set #default_value => TRUE to auto-check a programmatically verifiable item.

evals.prompt: Where does Checklist API save a checklist's progress, and how do I choose between the two backends? What data does it record about who completed an item?
evals.expected_output: Progress saves to config (default, object checklistapi.progress.{id}, exportable) or state (key checklistapi.progress.{id}), chosen per checklist with the #storage key. Each checked item records #completed (timestamp) and #uid (user) of its first completion, plus overall #changed, #changed_by, #completed_items.

evals.prompt: After I define a checklist with Checklist API, what routes and permissions get created automatically for it?
evals.expected_output: Per checklist it auto-generates routes checklistapi.checklists.{id} (view/fill) and checklistapi.checklists.{id}.clear, plus permissions 'view {id} checklistapi checklist' and 'edit {id} checklistapi checklist', alongside universal 'view any' / 'edit any' permissions.

evals.prompt: Another module defined a Checklist API checklist and I want to add and remove some of its items. Which hook do I use, and is there anything I cannot change with it?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_checklistapi_checklist_info_alter(array &$definitions) to add/move/remove checklists, groups, and items by reference. The #path cannot be altered here (routes are already built).

evals.prompt: In PHP, how do I load a Checklist API checklist and read how many items are complete and who last updated it?
evals.expected_output: Use checklistapi_checklist_load($id) to get a ChecklistapiChecklist, then getNumberCompleted(), getNumberOfItems(), getPercentComplete(), getLastUpdatedUser(), getLastUpdatedDate().

evals.prompt: Which Drush commands does Checklist API provide to see my checklists and their progress from the CLI?
evals.expected_output: drush checklistapi:list shows a table of all checklists with progress; drush checklistapi:info <id> shows one checklist's items with completion detail.

evals.prompt: Where does Checklist API show an overview of all checklists in the admin UI, and which permission controls access to it?
evals.expected_output: The Checklists report at /admin/reports/checklistapi (route checklistapi.report), gated by the 'view checklistapi checklists report' permission.
